summary: The paper evaluates a budget-aware classifier against a matched baseline.

claims.statement: A budget-aware classifier improves mean accuracy over a matched linear baseline on two public datasets.

reported_evidence.quote: improves mean accuracy over a matched linear baseline on two public datasets

strengths: The central comparison names a matched baseline and two public datasets.

findings.statement: The central comparison does not establish stability across runs.

evidence.quote: uses one fixed seed and reports no variance

findings.recommended_check: Report repeated-seed variability for the matched comparison.

score_proposal.rationale: The one-seed comparison leaves a major central evidence gap.
